---
title: "Environment Setup"
description: "Clone the repository and install all dependencies."
---

## 1. Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/timeanalysis.git
cd timeanalysis
```

## 2. Create a virtual environment

```bash
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate      # macOS / Linux
# .venv\Scripts\activate       # Windows PowerShell
```

## 3. Install dependencies

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

::: {.callout-note}
The `requirements.txt` pins exact versions so every team member runs the same code.
:::

## 4. Verify the installation

```python
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

print("All good! ✅")
```

## `requirements.txt` reference

```txt
numpy==1.26.4
pandas==2.2.2
scipy==1.13.0
plotly==5.22.0
matplotlib==3.9.0
jupyter==1.0.0
quarto>=1.4
```
